properties.description: Denies direct Azure RBAC role assignments to individual user identities and time-bound PIM eligible assignments for configured privileged administrator roles.
properties.displayName: CPP Restrict Direct User RBAC Assignments - (LVE)

nonComplianceMessages.message: Direct user RBAC role assignments are not permitted. Time-bound PIM eligible assignments for restricted privileged administrator roles are also not permitted. Assign roles through Entra ID Groups, Service Principals, or Managed Identities. See https://github.com/hmcts/cpp-azure-policy/blob/master/policies/rbac_no_direct_user_assignment/README.md
